programme.desc: Rue is offered a risky deal that draws her deeper into Alamo's world; Nate battles the city council, Maddy gives Cassie a mission that could skyrocket her new career; Lexi enlists Jules to create an original painting for LA Nights.

programme.title: The Greatest Showman
programme.desc: Growing up in the early 1800s, P.T. Barnum displays a natural talent for publicity and promotion, selling lottery tickets by age 12. After trying his hands at various jobs, P.T. turns to show business to indulge his limitless imagination, rising from nothing to create the Barnum & Bailey circus. Featuring catchy musical numbers, exotic performers and daring acrobatic feats, Barnum's mesmerizing spectacle soon takes the world by storm to become the greatest show on Earth.

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The War of the Rohirrim
programme.desc: A sudden attack by Wulf, a ruthless Dunlending lord, forces Helm Hammerhand and his people to make a daring last stand in the ancient stronghold of the Hornburg. Finding herself in an increasingly desperate situation, Helm's daughter, Héra, must lead the resistance against a deadly enemy who's intent on total destruction.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: Greg motivates the hockey team before a game, Katie focuses on her internship, and Archie gets feedback on his book.

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Valerie tries to repair the damage caused by negative AI press and save Mark's reality show job by making an appearance on "Finance Dudes.".

programme.title: The Dark Wizard
programme.desc: With a new relationship grounding him, Dean regains emotional stability and his long-held dream of flight comes to fruition when he immerses himself in the cutting-edge world of wingsuit flying.

programme.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
programme.desc: Still haunted by Beetlejuice, Lydia's life gets turned upside down when her daughter discovers a portal to the afterlife. When someone says Beetlejuice's name three times, the mischievous demon returns to unleash his very own brand of mayhem.

programme.title: Hidden Figures
programme.desc: Three brilliant African American women at NASA, Katherine Johnson, Dorothy Vaughan and Mary Jackson, serve as the brains behind one of the greatest operations in history, the launch of astronaut John Glenn into orbit, a stunning achievement that restored the nation's confidence, turned around the Space Race and galvanized the world.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: 1993. His mother asks Niall to lie in court about Ruben's violence, and he is conflicted. Ruben seems different now, so the decision weighs heavily on him.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Rue is offered a risky deal that draws her deeper into Alamo's world; Nate battles the city council, Maddy gives Cassie a mission that could skyrocket her new career; Lexi enlists Jules to create an original painting for LA Nights.

programme.title: MacGruber
programme.desc: In the decade since his fiancée was killed, an Army Ranger, Green Beret and Navy SEAL rolled into one has sworn off fighting crime, preferring instead to rock his mullet as a man of peace. But when his sworn enemy, Dieter Von Cunth, steals a nuclear warhead, only MacGruber and his crack team of experts are equal to the task of bringing the villain to justice.

programme.title: Dust Bunny
programme.desc: Ten-year-old Aurora asks a hit man to kill the monster she believes ate her entire family. To protect her, he'll need to battle an onslaught of assassins while accepting the fact that some monsters are real.

programme.title: Crazy Rich Asians
programme.desc: Rachel Chu is happy to accompany her longtime boyfriend, Nick, to his best friend's wedding in Singapore. She's also surprised to learn that Nick's family is extremely wealthy, and he's considered one of the country's most eligible bachelors. Thrust into the spotlight, Rachel must now contend with jealous socialites, quirky relatives and something far, far worse -- Nick's disapproving mother.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: 1993. His mother asks Niall to lie in court about Ruben's violence, and he is conflicted. Ruben seems different now, so the decision weighs heavily on him.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Rue is offered a risky deal that draws her deeper into Alamo's world; Nate battles the city council, Maddy gives Cassie a mission that could skyrocket her new career; Lexi enlists Jules to create an original painting for LA Nights.

programme.title: Greenland
programme.desc: John Garrity, his estranged wife and their young son embark on a perilous journey to find sanctuary as a planet-killing comet hurtles toward Earth. Amid terrifying accounts of cities getting leveled, the family experiences the best and worst in humanity. As the countdown to the global apocalypse approaches zero, their incredible trek culminates in a desperate, last-minute flight to a possible safe haven.

programme.title: Alien: Romulus
programme.desc: Space colonizers come face to face with the most terrifying life-form in the universe while scavenging the deep ends of a derelict space station.

programme.title: Magic Mike's Last Dance
programme.desc: Mike Lane takes to the stage once again when a business deal that went bust leaves him broke and bartending in Florida. Hoping for one last hurrah, Mike heads to London with a wealthy socialite who lures him with an offer he can't refuse -- and an agenda all her own. With everything on the line, he soon finds himself trying to whip a hot new roster of talented dancers into shape.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: 1993. His mother asks Niall to lie in court about Ruben's violence, and he is conflicted. Ruben seems different now, so the decision weighs heavily on him.

programme.title: Bad Education
programme.desc: A Long Island school superintendent and his assistant are credited with bringing the district unprecedented prestige. Frank is a master of positive messaging, whether before an audience of community leaders or in an office with a concerned student or parent. That changes when a student reporter uncovers an embezzlement scheme of epic proportions, prompting Frank to devise an elaborate cover-up.

programme.title: Battle of the Sexes
programme.desc: The 1973 tennis match between Billie Jean King and Bobby Riggs became the most watched televised sports event of all time. Trapped in the media glare, King and Riggs were on opposites sides of a binary argument, but off-court each was fighting more personal and complex battles. With her husband urging her to fight for equal pay, the private King was also struggling to come to terms with her own sexuality, while Riggs gambled his legacy and reputation in a bid to relive the glories of his past.

programme.title: Paddington 2
programme.desc: Settled in with the Brown family, Paddington the bear is a popular member of the community who spreads joy and marmalade wherever he goes. One fine day, he spots a pop-up book in an antique shop -- the perfect present for his beloved aunt's 100th birthday. When a thief steals the prized book, Paddington embarks on an epic quest to unmask the culprit before Aunt Lucy's big celebration.

programme.title: The Pope's Exorcist
programme.desc: Father Gabriele Amorth, chief exorcist of the Vatican, uncovers a centuries-old conspiracy while investigating a young boy's terrifying possession.

programme.title: Ramy Youssef: In Love
programme.desc: Ramy playfully engages with the audience as he approaches a vast spectrum of personal topics, both hilariously relatable and genuinely serious, all while doing so with the belief that you can find light and hope in all things if you just try to see them through a lens of love. Whether it's his marriage, being a dog parent, AI, or religion, Ramy comes at everything with his own brand of heart and humor.

programme.title: The Dark Wizard
programme.desc: With a new relationship grounding him, Dean regains emotional stability and his long-held dream of flight comes to fruition when he immerses himself in the cutting-edge world of wingsuit flying.

programme.title: Saltburn
programme.desc: A student is invited to an eccentric classmate's estate for an exciting summer.

programme.title: "Wuthering Heights"
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes when Heathcliff falls in love with Catherine Earnshaw, a woman from a wealthy family in 18th-century England.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: 1993. His mother asks Niall to lie in court about Ruben's violence, and he is conflicted. Ruben seems different now, so the decision weighs heavily on him.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Rue is offered a risky deal that draws her deeper into Alamo's world; Nate battles the city council, Maddy gives Cassie a mission that could skyrocket her new career; Lexi enlists Jules to create an original painting for LA Nights.

programme.title: Friendship
programme.desc: A suburban dad falls hard for his new neighbor.

programme.title: Logan
programme.desc: In the near future, a weary Logan (Hugh Jackman) cares for an ailing Professor X (Patrick Stewart) at a remote outpost on the Mexican border. His plan to hide from the outside world gets upended when he meets a young mutant (Dafne Keen) who is very much like him. Logan must now protect the girl and battle the dark forces that want to capture her.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: 1993. His mother asks Niall to lie in court about Ruben's violence, and he is conflicted. Ruben seems different now, so the decision weighs heavily on him.

programme.title: The Perfect Match
programme.desc: Charlie (Terrence J) is a charming playboy who doesn't believe in serious relationships. His best friends bet him that if he commits to one woman for one month, he's bound to fall in love. Charlie accepts the seemingly easy challenge, but wasn't expecting to cross paths with the beautiful and mysterious Eva (Cassie Ventura). When Charlie coaxes her into a casual affair, Eva turns the tables on him, forcing the lifelong bachelor to question whether he wants more than just a one-night stand.

programme.title: X-Men: First Class
programme.desc: In the early 1960s, during the height of the Cold War, a mutant named Charles Xavier (James McAvoy) meets a fellow mutant named Erik Lehnsherr (Michael Fassbender). Despite their vastly different backgrounds -- Charles grew up with a wealthy family, while Erik lost his parents at Auschwitz -- the two become close friends. As the world teeters on the brink of a nuclear war, Charles and Erik with other mutants join forces to save humanity. However, a situation soon tears the friends apart.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: 1993. His mother asks Niall to lie in court about Ruben's violence, and he is conflicted. Ruben seems different now, so the decision weighs heavily on him.

programme.title: Prometheus
programme.desc: The discovery of a clue to mankind's origins on Earth leads a team of explorers to the darkest parts of the universe. Two brilliant young scientists lead the expedition. Shaw hopes that they will meet a race of benevolent, godlike beings who will in some way verify her religious beliefs, while Holloway is out to debunk any spiritual notions. However, neither the scientists nor their shipmates are prepared for the unimaginable terrors that await them.

programme.title: Alien: Covenant
programme.desc: Bound for a remote planet on the far side of the galaxy, members (Katherine Waterston, Billy Crudup) of the colony ship Covenant discover what they think to be an uncharted paradise. While there, they meet David (Michael Fassbender), the synthetic survivor of the doomed Prometheus expedition. The mysterious world soon turns dark and dangerous when a hostile alien life-form forces the crew into a deadly fight for survival.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: During the approach of the most powerful storm in decades, university professor Dr. Jo Harding (Helen Hunt) and an underfunded team of students prepares the prototype for Dorothy, a ground-breaking tornado data-gathering device conceived by her estranged husband, Bill (Bill Paxton). When Harding tells Bill that Dorothy is ready for testing -- and that their privately funded rival Dr. Jonas Miller (Cary Elwes) has stolen the idea and built his own -- Bill rejoins the team for one last mission.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: After reuniting with Gwen Stacy, Brooklyn's full-time, friendly neighborhood Spider-Man is catapulted across the Multiverse, where he encounters a team of Spider-People charged with protecting its very existence. However, when the heroes clash on how to handle a new threat, Miles finds himself pitted against the other Spiders. He must soon redefine what it means to be a hero so he can save the people he loves most.

programme.title: The Dark Wizard
programme.desc: With a new relationship grounding him, Dean regains emotional stability and his long-held dream of flight comes to fruition when he immerses himself in the cutting-edge world of wingsuit flying.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: 1993. His mother asks Niall to lie in court about Ruben's violence, and he is conflicted. Ruben seems different now, so the decision weighs heavily on him.

programme.title: Barbie
programme.desc: Barbie and Ken are having the time of their lives in the colorful and seemingly perfect world of Barbie Land. However, when they get a chance to go to the real world, they soon discover the joys and perils of living among humans.

programme.title: Monster-in-Law
programme.desc: Charlotte (Jennifer Lopez) is smitten when she meets Dr. Kevin Fields (Michael Vartan). So when Kevin pops the question after they start dating, Charlotte happily accepts. But she soon realizes that Kevin's mom, Viola (Jane Fonda), is not quite thrilled to have a new family member. Viola, a newscaster, has just lost her job and is feeling rather attached to Kevin, so she regards Charlotte as her new competition -- and will apparently do anything to make her son call off the wedding.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Eclipse
programme.desc: Danger once again surrounds Bella, as a string of mysterious killings terrorizes Seattle and a malicious vampire continues her infernal quest for revenge. Amid the tumult, Bella must choose between her love for Edward and her friendship with Jacob, knowing that her decision may ignite the long-simmering feud between vampire and werewolf.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 1
programme.desc: At last, Bella and Edward are getting married. When Jacob finds out that Bella wants to spend her honeymoon as a human, he is horrified, for Edward's passion could accidentally kill her. Bella does indeed survive her honeymoon, but a new complication arises when she discovers that she's pregnant, and the child is growing at an alarming rate. The pregnancy sets the wolves against Bella and Edward, but Jacob vows to protect his friend.

programme.title: The Twilight Saga: Breaking Dawn Part 2
programme.desc: Bella awakes, as a vampire, from her life-threatening labor, and her newborn daughter, Renesmee, proves to be very special indeed. While Bella adjusts to her new state of being, Renesmee experiences accelerated growth. When the Volturi learn of the baby's existence, they declare her to be an abomination and sentence the Cullens to death. Bella, Edward and the rest of the clan seek help from allies around the world to protect their family.

programme.title: I Love You Forever
programme.desc: Following a young woman into and out of an emotionally abusive relationship.

programme.title: Magic Mike's Last Dance
programme.desc: Mike Lane takes to the stage once again when a business deal that went bust leaves him broke and bartending in Florida. Hoping for one last hurrah, Mike heads to London with a wealthy socialite who lures him with an offer he can't refuse -- and an agenda all her own. With everything on the line, he soon finds himself trying to whip a hot new roster of talented dancers into shape.

programme.title: Smoking Tigers
programme.desc: Lonely 16-year-old Korean American Hayoung tries to hide her problematic family and lower-income background from her new wealthy friends.

programme.title: My Cousin Rachel
programme.desc: Philip is a young Englishman who finds his cousin Ambrose dead after traveling to Florence, Italy. He vows revenge against Ambrose's missing wife Rachel, blaming her for his untimely demise. When Philip meets Rachel for the first time, his mood suddenly changes as he finds himself falling for her seductive charm and beauty. As his obsession for her grows, Rachel now hatches a scheme to win back her late husband's estate from the unsuspecting Philip.

programme.title: The Mortician
programme.desc: After David Sconce takes over his family's mortuary business, a local funeral director makes allegations about the crematorium.

programme.title: The Mortician
programme.desc: David expands the business as allegations of abuse mount; following his arrest, evidence is discovered in the death of a rival.

programme.title: The Mortician
programme.desc: Members of the Lamb family are convicted of various crimes, including fraud; while in prison, a murder charge is brought against David for the death of his competitor.

programme.title: The Witch
programme.desc: In 1630 New England, panic and despair envelops a farmer, his wife and their children when youngest son Samuel suddenly vanishes. The family blames Thomasin, the oldest daughter who was watching the boy at the time of his disappearance. With suspicion and paranoia mounting, twin siblings Mercy and Jonas suspect Thomasin of witchcraft, testing the clan's faith, loyalty and love to one another.

programme.title: The Conjuring
programme.desc: In 1970, paranormal investigators and demonologists Lorraine (Vera Farmiga) and Ed (Patrick Wilson) Warren are summoned to the home of Carolyn (Lili Taylor) and Roger (Ron Livingston) Perron. The Perrons and their five daughters have recently moved into a secluded farmhouse, where a supernatural presence has made itself known. Though the manifestations are relatively benign at first, events soon escalate in horrifying fashion, especially after the Warrens discover the house's macabre history.

programme.title: The Conjuring 2
programme.desc: In 1977, paranormal investigators Ed (Patrick Wilson) and Lorraine Warren come out of a self-imposed sabbatical to travel to Enfield, a borough in north London. There, they meet Peggy Hodgson, an overwhelmed single mother of four who tells the couple that something evil is in her home. Ed and Lorraine believe her story when the youngest daughter starts to show signs of demonic possession. As the Warrens try to help the besieged girl, they become the next targets of the malicious spirit.

programme.title: The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It
programme.desc: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren take on one of the most sensational cases of their careers after a cop stumbles upon a dazed and bloodied young man walking down the road. Accused of murder, the suspect claims demonic possession as his defense, forcing the Warrens into a supernatural inquiry unlike anything they've ever seen before.

programme.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites
programme.desc: In 1986 paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren travel to Pennsylvania to vanquish a demon from a family's home.

programme.title: Bring Her Back
programme.desc: A brother and sister uncover a terrifying ritual at the secluded home of their new foster mother.

programme.title: Men
programme.desc: Harper retreats to the countryside to be alone in the wake of a tragedy, but her unease at the town's leering and uncannily similar men grows into a fully fledged nightmare as her arrival awakens something primal in the forest.

programme.title: Freaky Tales
programme.desc: An NBA star, a corrupt cop, a female rap duo, teenage punks, neo-Nazis and a debt collector embark on a collision course in 1987 Oakland, Calif.

programme.title: Martin Lawrence: You So Crazy
programme.desc: Filmed at a sold-out Majestic Theater in Brooklyn, N.Y., comedian Martin Lawrence delivers his first full-length stand-up special. Harking back to Eddie Murphy, the leather-clad comic riffs on drugs, jail, his impoverished upbringing with his mother and his luck -- or lack thereof -- with women. He also speaks at length about racism and the Rodney King ruling and subsequent riots. Lawrence even offers his unique perspective on how to maintain a successful relationship.

programme.title: While We're Young
programme.desc: Middle-aged filmmaker Josh Srebnick (Ben Stiller) and his wife, Cornelia (Naomi Watts), are happily married, but stuck in a rut. So, when free-spirited couple Jamie (Adam Driver) and Darby (Amanda Seyfried) enter their lives, it's like a breath of fresh air -- especially for Josh, who pines for a youth he wishes he had. Soon, Josh and Cornelia are ditching friends their own age to hang out with the hipsters -- but whether the friendship can endure despite a 20-year age gap remains to be seen.

programme.title: Man of Steel
programme.desc: With the imminent destruction of Krypton, their home planet, Jor-El (Russell Crowe) and his wife seek to preserve their race by sending their infant son to Earth. The child's spacecraft lands at the farm of Jonathan (Kevin Costner) and Martha (Diane Lane) Kent, who name him Clark and raise him as their own son. Though his extraordinary abilities have led to the adult Clark (Henry Cavill) living on the fringe of society, he finds he must become a hero to save those he loves from a dire threat.

programme.title: Black Adam
programme.desc: In ancient Kahndaq, Teth Adam was bestowed the almighty powers of the gods. After using these powers for vengeance, he was imprisoned, becoming Black Adam. Nearly 5,000 years have passed, and Black Adam has gone from man to myth to legend. Now free, his unique form of justice, born out of rage, is challenged by modern-day heroes who form the Justice Society: Hawkman, Dr. Fate, Atom Smasher and Cyclone.

programme.title: Life of Pi
programme.desc: After deciding to sell their zoo in India and move to Canada, Santosh and Gita Patel board a freighter with their sons and a few remaining animals. Tragedy strikes when a terrible storm sinks the ship, leaving the Patels' teenage son, Pi, as the only human survivor. However, Pi is not alone; a fearsome Bengal tiger has also found refuge aboard the lifeboat. As days turn into weeks and weeks drag into months, Pi and the tiger must learn to trust each other if both are to survive.

programme.title: Fukushima: A Nuclear Nightmare
programme.desc: Reconstructing the nine harrowing days following the disaster in forensic, real-time detail, from the control-room engineers fighting to prevent a total meltdown, to the political leaders confronting the unthinkable, to ordinary citizens caught in the fallout. Power plant workers who were tasked with averting a major catastrophe by doing a potential suicide mission. These 50 workers recount the mounting pressures they faced as they entered the darkened reactors to try to avert the worst outcome.

programme.title: Spring Awakening: Those You've Known
programme.desc: The original cast and creative team of "Spring Awakening" reunite 15 years after the Tony-winning Broadway run for a concert to benefit The Actors Fund; participants include cast members Jonathan Groff, Lea Michele and Skylar Astin.

programme.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
programme.desc: When an interdimensional rupture unravels reality, an unlikely hero must channel her newfound powers to fight bizarre and bewildering dangers from the multiverse.

programme.title: Eddington
programme.desc: A standoff between a small-town sheriff and mayor sparks a powder keg as neighbor is pitted against neighbor in May 2020 in Eddington, N.M.

programme.title: A Good Day to Die Hard
programme.desc: New York City cop John McClane (Bruce Willis) arrives in Moscow to track down his estranged son, Jack (Jai Courtney). McClane thinks his son is a criminal, so it comes as a shock when he learns that Jack is actually working undercover to protect Komarov (Sebastian Koch), a Russian government whistleblower. With their own lives on the line, McClane and Jack must overcome their differences in order to get Komarov to safety and thwart a potentially disastrous crime in the Chernobyl region.

programme.title: Atomic Blonde
programme.desc: Sensual and savage, Lorraine Broughton is the most elite spy in MI6, an agent who's willing to use all of her lethal skills to stay alive during an impossible mission. With the Berlin Wall about to fall, she travels into the heart of the city to retrieve a priceless dossier and take down a ruthless espionage ring. Once there, she teams up with an embedded station chief to navigate her way through the deadliest game of spies.

programme.title: Flight Risk
programme.desc: A U.S. marshal boards a small plane to transfer a government witness to New York. As they cross the Alaskan wilderness, tensions start to rise as not everyone on the flight is who they appear to be.

programme.title: Death of a Unicorn
programme.desc: A weekend retreat has deadly consequences when a father and daughter accidentally hit and kill a unicorn while en route to find his billionaire boss, who seeks to exploit the creature's miraculous curative properties.

programme.title: The Greatest Showman
programme.desc: Growing up in the early 1800s, P.T. Barnum displays a natural talent for publicity and promotion, selling lottery tickets by age 12. After trying his hands at various jobs, P.T. turns to show business to indulge his limitless imagination, rising from nothing to create the Barnum & Bailey circus. Featuring catchy musical numbers, exotic performers and daring acrobatic feats, Barnum's mesmerizing spectacle soon takes the world by storm to become the greatest show on Earth.

programme.title: Ne Zha 2
programme.desc: Born to mortal parents, a rebellious young demigod uses his immense powers to battle an ancient force that's bent on humanity's destruction.

programme.title: Super/Man: The Christopher Reeve Story
programme.desc: Actor Christopher Reeve rises to stardom when he lands the role of Superman in the 1970s. When a horse-riding accident leaves him paralyzed in 1995, Reeve spends the rest of his life searching for a cure for spinal cord injuries.

programme.title: My Mom Jayne
programme.desc: Mariska Hargitay's journey to understand and embrace the public and private legacy of her mother, Hollywood icon Jayne Mansfield.

programme.title: Nine Lives
programme.desc: Tom Brand is a billionaire whose workaholic lifestyle takes him away from his loving wife Lara and adorable daughter Rebecca. Needing a present for Rebecca's 11th birthday, Brand buys a seemingly harmless cat from a mysterious pet store. Suddenly, a bizarre turn of events traps poor Tom inside the animal's body. The owner of the business tells him that he has one week to reconnect with his family, or live out the rest of his days as a cute and furry feline named Mr. Fuzzypants.

programme.title: Girls Trip
programme.desc: Best friends Ryan, Sasha, Lisa and Dina are in for the adventure of a lifetime when they travel to New Orleans for the annual Essence Festival. Along the way, they rekindle their sisterhood and rediscover their wild side by doing enough dancing, drinking, brawling and romancing to make the Big Easy blush.

programme.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: The Long Haul
programme.desc: Young Greg Heffley is looking forward to a long summer of just hanging out, but his mother throws a monkey wrench into his plans when she forces the entire family to take a road trip for a relative's birthday celebration. His eyes soon light up after he realizes that the excursion is his ticket to a gaming convention to meet YouTube sensation Mac Digby. Greg's imagination then kicks into overdrive as he sneakily hatches a scheme to attend the expo and gain some much-deserved fame.

programme.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Dog Days
programme.desc: It's summer, and Greg Heffley (Zachary Gordon) is looking forward to playing video games and spending time with his friends. However, Greg's dad (Steve Zahn) has other plans: He's decided that some father-son bonding time is in order. Desperate to prevent his dad from ruining summer vacation, Greg pretends he has a job at a ritzy country club. But Greg's plan backfires, leaving him in the middle of embarrassing mishaps and a camping trip gone wrong.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
programme.desc: Now known as the Dragon Warrior, Po protects the Valley of Peace alongside his friends and fellow kung fu masters, the Furious Five. However, a dangerous villain threatens Po's awesome new life with plans to use a secret weapon to wipe out the martial art and conquer China. In order to defeat the new enemy, Po finds he must recall his past and unlock secrets of his mysterious origins; only then will he find the strength to vanquish his foe.

programme.title: Grace and Frankie

programme.title: The Babysitter's Seduction
programme.desc: Michelle starts working for a wealthy family. But, when the wife is found dead, Michelle becomes a suspect.

programme.title: Forbidden Woman
programme.desc: A young attorney reaches a pivotal point in his career when he falls in love with the wife of his boss.

programme.title: Why Did I Get Married?
programme.desc: Explore the trials of marriage and what happens to one family when a sexy young temptress arrives on the scene

programme.title: Why Did I Get Married Too
programme.desc: Four couples struggle to save their marriages once again on their annual marriage retreat.

programme.title: Single Moms Club
programme.desc: When five single moms form a support group, they find inspiration and laughter in their new sisterhood.

programme.title: Mad Money

This episode features Lise and Cait, who are best friends running a bread bakery in Barrie, Ontario - it's already a dream come true, but now they'd like to buy the building it's in.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: Drama continues in Vietnam as Liv has doubts about her friendship with Elma. Can they see each other's point of view and move on? Meanwhile, romance is in the air as the group find out that Dani and Jonnie have kissed. Dani updates Ella and Jodie about her being in her cougar era; she's playing it cool but doesn't deny it could happen again. Back in Essex, Sophie and Jordan are taking the next steps towards parenthood, unpacking their baby shopping as their new arrival becomes more real by the day. After the fallout of Freddie's departure from Vietnam, Saff is more confused than ever. She wants to get to the bottom of it, so when Freddie comes round to see her it's the perfect opportunity to clear things up. Will they be able to repair their friendship?

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. When Brian reluctantly signs up for The Price is Right at Stewie's insistence, he ends up winning a boat and quickly lets this go to his head - after prompting Stewie to call him out of his hypocrisy regarding game shows, Brian names his boat Row v Wade to prove that he has a social conscience and picks up women from Texas seeking legal abortions. Meanwhile, Banksy paints on Peter's face after a drinking binge.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Subversive animated comedy. After Peter drinks heavily at a bachelor party - even though he told Lois he would not - he is fired from his job at the Happy-Go-Lucky toy factory for being hung over. He applies for welfare, but a mix-up results in him being sent a cheque for 150,000 dollars.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. When Peter is at the Drunken Clam lamenting the fact that he's stuck working at the Pawtucket Brewery and never obtained his dream job, Joe gets the idea for everyone to share their own dream occupations - Peter imagines himself as Agent 555 Lap Band, Quagmire sees himself as an overweight bachelor in the 1980s who invents aerobics, and Cleveland envisions himself working in the Los Angeles Police Department.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Animated series about Stan Smith, who works for the CIA and is constantly on the alert for terrorist activity. Stan is mad because after getting his wife a job as an estate agent, she makes more money than him. His daughter Hayley runs a programme to help the homeless, and son Steve wants to make a TV show involving tramps fighting each other.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Stan goes head-to-head with Roger when he starts stealing birds' eggs. Plus, Francine tries new Italian cooking sauce.

programme.title: G'wed
programme.desc: Comedy series providing an honest, uplifting and heart-warming portrayal of the lives of working-class teenagers from Liverpool while tackling issues with a refreshing humour. It's Diversity and Inclusion Week and The Brimble, the most 'woke' girl at the school, has convinced the headmaster that the pupils should be set the task of pairing up with their polar opposite and present their differences and common ground in a presentation. Mo, who has fancied The Brimble for ages, spots his opportunity to try and impress her by suggesting they team up as he is a devout practising Muslim (he's not). Fascinated by his alleged faith, The Brimble leaps at the chance and asks if she can come to his house to observe a real Muslim family - keen to keep up the pretence, Mo calls his non-practicing Muslim parents and begs them to help him out. They agree... but when Mo and The Brimble arrive at the house, it becomes apparent that they are going to teach their son a life lesson about truth and faith.

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Enduring '70s British sitcom about a chirpy driver and his conductor pal who torment the long-suffering inspector of the Luxton Bus Company. Stan decides to do some weight-training... and uses his girlfriend Doreen as the weight.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Val learns that her tattoo refers to a barman from her holiday, and Bonnie forces her into an all-day drinking session in return for keeping it from Eric. Doug drowns his sorrows.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Paul uncovers Bonnie's deception and tells her to leave the village. Jo enjoys a stress-free day with Andy, and Laurel is shocked by Doug's behaviour when he buys a sports car.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Tony smooth-talks his way into Sally's good books and gets a surveyor to value the garage. Marcus investigates college courses, while Maria begins to resent Liam's life of leisure.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Fired up by Kevin's refusal to do a deal, Tony draws an unsuspecting Rosie into his latest scheme and Sean gets a rude awakening when he returns to work after a boozy lunch break.

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Morse and Lewis investigate a murder in a quiet country church where a vicar and his voluntary helpers are the unlikely prime suspects - although at first baffled, and more at home in a pub than a pulpit, Morse pursues his investigations religiously.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nostalgic police drama series. The police investigate a case of hit and run - and Maggie is the chief suspect. Greengrass dabbles in taxidermy, and Jo has a proposal for Nick.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Drama series set in 1960s Yorkshire. After being sacked, a man goes berserk but Greengrass is on hand with a plan. Aidensfield becomes the location for a fashion photo shoot, and Nick's relationship with Jo is put to the test.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: While family life is far from normal at the home of Eileen Fountain - the steward at prestigious Whiteoaks Golf Club - club captain Martin Crisp is trying to buy back nearby Pellings, a rambling manor house once owned by his family, from golfing president Will Tunstall. As the peaceful setting of the prestigious club is rocked by death and controversy when a golfer is bludgeoned to death near the notorious 13th hole known as Crisp's Folly, Barnaby and Jones learn that crime is rife there...

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jo stands up to Andy when he becomes violent. Bob struggles to cope running both the cafe and the post office, and Laurel is disgusted to learn Doug spent the night with Bonnie.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Daz searches for Andy. Marlon and Paddy seek revenge when Jamie throws them out of the Woolpack, and Nicola continues her efforts to get Rodney to write another book.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Maria warns a hung-over Liam that baby-making is off the agenda. Kevin suspects Rosie is having an affair with Tony, and Lloyd prepares for Steve's return.

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Steve has to think fast when he arrives home to face Becky and Michelle. Meanwhile, Tony introduces Carla to his mechanic mate Jimmy as his bid for the garage continues.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Drama series set in 1960s Yorkshire. Nick goes undercover to investigate strong-arm tactics in the jukebox business. Ventress goes on a disastrous stag night, and a visit from Inspector Hackett leaves Blaketon a very worried man.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nick is concerned when a young black Londoner becomes the suspect in a violent robbery, and Greengrass takes bets on a cricket match against Whitby.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. PC Penhale is desperate to keep Maggie and show her that he's changed, but Maggie plans to return to Bude once she has the all-clear from her doctor - as Penhale resorts to desperate measures to convince her to stay, a final effort at bravado in trying to climb a ladder to rescue school caretaker Mr Coley from the roof fails miserably when he is frozen with fear halfway up the ladder. Meanwhile, Mr Coley has become increasingly muddled and has put the children at risk by spraying poisonous fertiliser - when he doesn't know why he's on the roof, the Doc must bravely scale Penhale's ladder to rescue him. Elsewhere, Aunt Ruth uncovers a chest of family heirlooms when she clears out a barn at the farm that bring back poignant memories of an unhappy childhood for Martin, and tension mounts between Louisa and Martin when they can't seem to agree on anything and she learns that Martin has set a date for their baby's christening without even consulting her.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Bert's restaurant is financial trouble as he can't even afford the food and drink for a charity event to raise money for Florence Dingle's cat sanctuary - Mrs Dingle is distraught as she desperately needs the money to continue to look after the cats and kittens in her care. Bert is also being chased by loan sharks Alastair Tonken and his son Norman for the repayment of money they gave him to clear his debts - when Bert and Al decide to confront the loan sharks just as they are approaching Mrs Dingley to pressure her for money they loaned to her, Mrs Dingley falls off her bike and lapses in and out of consciousness with the Doc and PC Penhale in attendance. Meanwhile, Louisa's mum Eleanor's attempt to come to Bert's rescue ends up with her requiring the Doc's help with a condition that requires immediate care, and Martin shows little interest in organising James Henry's christening in the village with Louisa as he continues his plans to resume his surgical career.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Crime drama series. When a victim of a frenzied attack is found in the woods with his head caved in, initially the team wonders if it is a random attack or related to the location where a local girl recently died by suicide - Banks, however, has a theory of his own. When the victim is identified as small-time drug dealer Damon Horsley and Banks uncovers a link to local crime boss Steve Richards, he is convinced that the hitherto untouchable Richards had a part in the murder.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Crime drama series. The apparent suicide of Steve Richards' daughter Kat leaves the grieving father to conduct his own unique brand of investigation that relies on violence to procure answers - meanwhile, Banks is suspicious, a hunch that is confirmed when it seems that Kat's death is not suicide after all and that someone else may have been involved. The team now have two murders to solve... and the pressure is on.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: After seven years of ducking the question, Lewis and Hobson are embarking on a relationship while the Oxford detective has a new mystery to solve - former don Richard Seager is murdered on the night of his release from prison after being crushed to death by a Jaguar Mark II. Seager's wife Martha insists that Rachel Cliff, the sister of Seager's victim, is the killer - Lewis and Hathaway visit Rachel, who claims that she spent the night at Benison College with Adam Tibbit. Investigations at the college reveal that Seager not only had major disagreements with the provost, but was also preparing to divorce Martha...

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Enduring '70s British sitcom about a chirpy driver and his conductor pal who torment the long-suffering inspector of the Luxton Bus Company. Jack gets promoted to the position of inspector as Stan gets more than he bargained for when he invites a new conductor home for tea.

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Absolute Conviction: The sudden death of a convict leads Inspector Morse and Sergeant Lewis to investigate the complex affairs of three businessmen jailed for fraud. [SL,S,AD] S6 Ep4

programme.title: Inspector Morse: The Wench is Dead
programme.desc: Detective drama featuring Colin Dexter's enigmatic chief inspector. Morse investigates a murder that takes him away from the familiar setting of 20th-century Oxford to solving a canal murder in Oxford in 1859 - he becomes convinced that the boatmen publicly hanged for the murder were victims of a gross miscarriage of justice and, nearly 140 years after their deaths on the gallows, sets out to establish the true facts of the case.

programme.title: Endeavour
programme.desc: Crime drama series about the young Detective Constable Endeavour Morse. July 1966 - Oxford's streets are deserted as England and Argentina kick off in the World Cup quarter-final and an elderly man is brutally murdered in an almost empty museum. Endeavour and Thursday's investigation sends them to a girls' school which is haunted by memories of an atrocity committed almost 100 years earlier - after Endeavour finds that a note reading 'Save Me' has been slipped into his coat pocket, tensions teeter over a knife-edge when one of the girls at the school disappears without trace or explanation. As Endeavour digs into the school's troubled history and determines a connection between the elderly man's untimely fate and a series of murders on the Blythe Mount grounds, spectres from the past threaten to crash into the present and the bounds of the young detective's rational mind are tested.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Crime thriller featuring the author's much-loved spinster sleuth. When Tommy and Tuppence visit an elderly aunt in her nursing home, Tuppence is concerned by some odd behaviour of the staff and residents - when Tuppence later hears about Aunt Ada's sudden death and the disappearance of her aunt's friend Mrs Lancaster, she realises that her concerns were right. Tuppence then meets Miss Marple to follow a path of clues that leads them to the village of Farrell St Edmund - and find a community that is guarding an array of secrets.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Crime drama. When a young female member of a New Age cult called the Oblong Foundation goes missing, DCI John Barnaby investigates and sends DS Jones undercover at the cult's base of Malham Hall - the police learn that the hall's previous owners, Jeremy and Carolyn Lambert, died in a gas explosion on board their boat. At the local pub, Barnaby hears various conspiracy theories about how the Lamberts met their death - their lawyer reveals that her clients withdrew thousands of pounds from their account supposedly for gambling and also gave them advice about the use of a promissory note. While Barnaby tries to find out who might have borrowed money from the Lamberts, another cult member dies suspiciously - the police uncover existence of a promissory note and discover that the man who witnessed it died the same night as the Lamberts. Can Barnaby and Jones find out who killed the owners of Malham Hall and if the case has a link to the missing woman?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a farmer is found horribly murdered in the middle of a stone circle, suspicion points at a group of druids - DCI John Barnaby and DS Jones hurry to the scene of the crime and are joined by new pathologist Kate Wilding on her first assignment. Druid high priest Leticia Clifford shows Barnaby that sacred ley lines run through the stone circle and is later convinced that she has made an exciting discovery - however, she is stabbed to death before she can share her theory. When a third body is then found, Barnaby starts to believe that basic human greed rather than spiritualism is the real motive for murder...

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Jones enter the cloistered and old-fashioned world of Midsomer Priory after a nun is found strangled - Jones visits the local pub and learns that a woman was seen acting strangely on the day of the murder and that teenagers in the area sneak into the priory grounds for romantic liaisons. The nuns then discover that a valuable silver altar set has vanished and that a chaplain has been murdered - can Barnaby and Jones work out the connection between the holy orders, the missing silver, and some African art while uncovering the killer?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Members of the Midsomer-in-the-Marsh Ornithological Society fall out when one of them, Ralph Ford, claims that he has spotted a blue-crested hoopoe - the sighting puts him ahead in a list competition, but MMOS president Patrick Morgan says that the bird could never have been seen in Midsomer as it is native to Uganda. Ralph storms out of the meeting infuriated - the next day Patrick is found dead in Swansdown Lake, the scene of the alleged hoopoe sighting, and his body is pulled from the lake entangled in a mist net used to catch and release birds. The dead man's wife Nina, a former Russian prima ballerina, had recently become pregnant - before his death Patrick Morgan accused Nina of sleeping with another man and professed it to be impossible that she was pregnant. Was Patrick's obsession with ornithology really to blame for his death, or something more sinister? Barnaby and Jones attempt to discover the truth.

programme.title: Grace
programme.desc: Crime drama. East Sussex CID emerges from the ashes of a shocking betrayal and prepares for a major criminal trial - after Grace's team intercepted millions of pounds of cocaine being smuggled into Newhaven port in a case where courier Daniel Starr worked for an elusive figure known as The Merchant, who had evaded identification for years, Starr gave up The Merchant's identity and Grace is determined to see him go down for his crimes as the ruthless drug lord faces trial. Meanwhile, Brighton resident Meg Magellan's daughter Laura leaves for a gap year and Meg receives a jury summons which brings with it a terrifying dilemma - as the trial unravels, Grace becomes convinced that The Merchant is trying to destabilise the case against him and must work doggedly to find whoever is doing his dirty work. As a double murder at a local park throws his team into a puzzling case, Grace is pushed to the brink to see justice done before an unwelcome conversation burdens him with a terrible secret.

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: First-ever episode of the drama series following Colin Dexter's popular detective. Morse teams up with his future partner Sergeant Lewis to investigate the case of an attractive woman found dead at her home - all the evidence points to suicide, but Morse is convinced that he is dealing with a murder.

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Enduring '70s British sitcom about a chirpy driver and his conductor pal who torment the long-suffering inspector of the Luxton Bus Company. Arthur is attracted to Beryl, a clippie on his regular bus - however, Beryl has only two interests in life, men with a fondness for athletics and those with a good head of hair.

programme.title: Teleshopping

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Classic sitcom about a chirpy bus driver and his conductor pal. Stan has a flashback of the day he became a driver... which, as it turns out, is the same day that he met his new conductor Jack...

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Morse and Lewis uncover a web of secrecy, corruption and murder among the colleges of Oxford when Nicholas Quinn is found murdered after overhearing a conversation which was not supposed to involve him - his colleagues, who are all members of Oxford University's examinations board, are under suspicion, but one thing puzzles Morse during the case... how did Quinn overhear a conversation when he was deaf?

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: Service of All the Dead: Morse and Lewis investigate a murder in a quiet country church where a vicar and his voluntary helpers are the unlikely prime suspects. [SL,S,AD] S1 Ep3

programme.title: Rosemary & Thyme
programme.desc: Light-hearted drama series. With English vineyards growing in reputation in the global wine market, Laura and Rosemary are excited to be invited to the Crickle Valley vineyard - however, weeds are choking this year's crop and the gardeners are stumped for a horticultural solution to this massive problem. Events turn sinister when a visiting wine columnist staying at the winery's hotel dies in mysterious circumstances - meanwhile, brothers Ben and Stuart, who run the vineyard and hotel respectively, are at odds over the future of the property in a rivalry made worse by the murder of Daisy, who was Ben's girlfriend and Stuart's employee. Can cunning detective work by Rosemary and Laura unmask the killer and ensure that this year's vintage of Crickle Valley wines will finally make it to the bottles?

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Crime thriller featuring the author's much-loved spinster sleuth. When a blizzard sets in and Miss Marple is forced to take refuge at Sittaford House - which is isolated on a bleak Devon moor - the owner of the house inexplicably decides to spend the night at a local hotel where a Ouija board predicts his death. He is later found dead in his room - and Miss Marple's suspicions are confirmed...

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Jones investigate when the appearance of a headless horseman at Quitewell Hall foreshadows a number of deaths among an aristocratic family called the DeQuettevilles - as the family stage a Civil War re-enactment with their hostile neighbours and relive historic battles, can the detectives uncover the truth about the DeQuettevilles and the ghostly rider in order to prevent more murders?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Grady Felton returns home to Midsomer after serving time for the murder of local youngster Daniel Denning, and Daniel's extended family are angry at his reappearance. Around the time that Grady arrives, his defence barrister Giles Harrison is killed. Grady had threatened Harrison and others - including Jones - but his alibi is strong. Later, Grady's house is firebombed, leaving him in a coma. Daniel's former friend Fred Burns is on trial for drugs offences. When Barnaby looks into Fred's background, he finds that a large sum of money appeared in Fred's bank account after the attack on Grady. After the court appearance, Jones learns that another lawyer on Grady's hit-list has been killed - but since Grady is in intensive care, he could not have been the culprit. As the detectives look further into the case, they discover that Grady always claimed innocence. Could a 'friend' be acting out Grady's revenge plan?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: As darkness covers Midsomer Stanton during a total eclipse of the sun, amateur astronomer Jeremy Harper is killed by a blow to the head with a meteorite. Barnaby and Jones soon discover intrigue, sexual tension and academic rivalry are rife among the star-seeking community.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The murder of a journalist has chilling echoes of a 1960s horror film starring Midsomer's own Stella Harris. When Stella's more famous sister returns after a 40-year family rift, the killings escalate, each of them reminiscent of a movie plot. Is life - and death - imitating art?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Detective series, based on the novels by Caroline Graham, that follows Inspector Barnaby as he investigates murder mysteries in Middle England. The writers' circle in the tranquil village of Midsomer Worthy is eagerly anticipating a visit from a best-selling novelist, but the aspiring authors are about to witness a sequence of gruesome events far stranger than any fiction.

programme.title: Secret Service
programme.desc: The first episode of an action-packed and thrilling adaptation of ITV News journalist Tom Bradby's 2019 novel. An MI6 agent learns that there is a Russian asset in the UK Cabinet. [SL,S,AD]

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: The American version of Gordon Ramsay's culinary boot camp. Olympic champion Jordan Chiles shows the chefs how to find balance in a gymnastics-themed challenge when they are tasked with impressing guest judge chef Evan Funke with four signature pasta dishes - while serving beach volleyball Olympic gold medallist Alix Klineman and actor and comedian Kel Mitchell, some chefs are praised for rising as leaders while others crash and burn.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Classic US detective drama. Theo accuses a district attorney of corruption for failing to convict his friend's killer - when he is suspended from duty for the outburst, he elects to set out to get justice on his own.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Sixties adventure series about suave freelance troubleshooter Simon Templar. The Saint finds some heady wine at the end of a counterfeit trail leading from London to Switzerland via Paris, and the involvement of a bogus countess only complicates matters further.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Veteran actors TP McKenna, William Simons and Larry Lamb guest star in this episode of the classic drama starring Michael Elphick. programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Cult '70s police drama. Regan is fitted up by an ex-con making an effort to get his daughter's criminal boyfriend out of the picture.

programme.title: Battlebots

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Cult '70s police drama. Carter's girlfriend asks him to find a missing villain, but the plot thickens when he is found dead.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about the dodgy dealings of a loveable rogue and his sidekick. As Arthur continues his business ventures in Europe, Ray is given the task of minding a valuable racing pigeon due to race from London to Bradford with a prize of 10,000 pounds at stake.

programme.title: American Pickers

Also features table toppers Leeds United against Sheffield United and Stoke City against Southampton.

programme.title: The Grand Fishing Adventure
programme.desc: Ali Hamidi is joined by angling buddy Roo Abbott and diver Luc Boerrigter at Millhayes Lakes in Devon. The mission is to catch a 30lb UK carp, with the bite filmed on an underwater camera. Small lakes in springtime can be notoriously tricky, so with the addition of a diver and underwater cameras, this will be no easy task. After catching some smaller specimens, they crack the tactics and bait code, but will they bank that illusive 30lber before the end of the trip?

programme.title: The Grand Fishing Adventure

Being spring, the carp are constantly on the move around the lake, with the team in hot pursuit. Will the carp run rings around the team, or will the mobile tactics pay off to bank that big one?

programme.title: River Monsters
programme.desc: Extreme fishing series. After travelling to over 20 dramatic locations in search of monster fish, biologist and extreme angler Jeremy Wade encounters a most dangerous challenge when stories of attacks in a remote corner of Ukraine take him on a hunt for an elusive lake monster and then to the most unlikely and extraordinary location of his career - Chernobyl's reactor number 4, the site of the worst nuclear accident in history. In a nerve-shredding race against radiation and time, can Jeremy reveal the culprit and deliver it to scientists who are searching for evidence of mutant species?

programme.title: Field of Dreams
programme.desc: Classic fantasy drama. Iowa farmer Ray Kinsella hears a voice in a cornfield tell him, 'If you build it, he will come' - he interprets this message as an instruction to build a baseball field on his farm that the ghosts of Shoeless Joe Jackson and seven other Chicago White Sox players banned from the game for throwing the 1919 World Series appear upon. When the voices continue, Ray seeks out a reclusive author to help him understand the meaning of the messages and the purpose for his field...

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: As rising temperatures soften the ice road, the truckers risk a cold and watery grave. Their only hope is to form a convoy, but it is never easy on terrible terrain.

programme.title: The Grand Fishing Adventure
programme.desc: Ali Hamidi is joined by Bobby Zamora and diver Luc Boerrigter as they return to The Lake of Dreams, aka Grenville. Arizona Deputy Sheriff Coogan is sent to New York City to collect James Ringerman, a prisoner who has escaped from custody in Arizona - while Coogan is annoyed when everyone in New York City assumes that he is from Texas, his problems are made worse by news that the prisoner is in Bellevue after taking a trip on drugs while in custody. When Coogan decides to cut a few corners and the prisoner escapes in the process, Coogan is ordered home but refuses to do so without his man...
